title: epipactis × nicolosii
intro: Epipactis × nicolosii is a hybrid orchid plant, a cross between Epipactis palustris and Epipactis helleborine. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Epipactis × nicolosii include infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
